title: General Manager
description:
General Manager – Confidential Search

Location: Singapore

Our client is a renowned hospitality group with a strong commitment to service excellence and a diverse portfolio across the region. They are seeking a passionate and results-driven General Manager. This hospitality leader should possess extensive commercial experience within the luxury segment of an international hotel brand to join their dynamic team in Singapore as General Manager.

Position Overview

As the General Manager, you will serve as the face of the brand and the property, leading with vision, integrity, and a guest-centric mindset. You will be responsible for driving operational excellence, cultivating a high-performance culture, and delivering exceptional guest experiences. Your strategic leadership and commercial acumen will be key to achieving business objectives and positioning the property as a market leader in the luxury hospitality segment.

Key Responsibilities

* Commercial Leadership

-Provide strategic direction and oversee the overall management of the property.

- Drive revenue growth and profitability through effective financial planning and operational efficiency.

- Ensure full compliance with all regulatory requirements and internal operational standards.

* Team Development

- Lead talent acquisition efforts to attract and retain top-tier hospitality professionals.

- Foster a collaborative, inclusive, and high-engagement work environment.

- Build strong relationships with local stakeholders and the broader community.

* Service Excellence

- Uphold and enhance service and product standards to exceed guest expectations consistently.

- Champion the brand’s values and ensure alignment with brand standards across all departments.

- Inspire a culture of continuous improvement and guest satisfaction.

* Qualifications & Experience

- Proven experience as a General Manager or in a senior leadership role with extensive commercial experience within a luxury segment of an international hotel brand.

- Background in luxury hotel commercial experience is highly preferred.

- Demonstrated ability to lead, inspire, and develop high-performing teams.

- Strong interpersonal and communication skills with a strategic and innovative mindset.

- Track record of delivering strong commercial results and achieving key performance indicators (KPIs).

* You Will Embody the Brand By

- Setting and executing ambitious short- and long-term financial goals aligned with brand strategy.

- Creating a positive and empowering environment for team members and guests alike.

- Building and maintaining strong owner relations while maximising asset performance.

To Apply

Please submit your resume to Jimmy at jimmy.teo@compassrose.sg, quoting the job title- CRH20260129

We regret that only successfully shortlisted applicants will be contacted.

Licence No: 25S2729

EA Reg: R25128844

Apply before: 28 Feb, 2026

postedCompany.description:
We are a team of passionate professionals in the industry, with exceptional experience as our guide on our journey. As a leading hospitality consultant, we are committed to redefining luxury and providing customised solutions that meet the unique needs of each hotel. Built on excellence and innovation, COMPASS ROSE Hospitality is your trusted partner for delivering unforgettable guest experiences and achieving financial results that meet the owners' expectations.

At COMPASS ROSE Hospitality, we specialise in transforming hospitality businesses through comprehensive consulting, training, and executive recruitment services. With a team of industry experts, we are committed to helping you achieve excellence and sustainable growth.

Hotel consultancy
Our consulting services are designed to elevate your operations, improve the guest experience and optimise business performance. We provide solutions tailored to your unique needs, from strategic planning to operational efficiency.

Training and coaching
Empower your team with our tailored training and coaching programs. We focus on improving essential skills, developing leadership, and fostering teamwork to ensure your staff can deliver exceptional service.

Executive recruitment services
Finding the right leaders is critical to your success. Our executive search services connect you with top talent who align with your vision and values. We carefully vet and match candidates to ensure they are a perfect fit for your organisation.


EA license: 25S2729
